name: Lefit0_ is miner with a o
description:
I want to mention that i am not a active user of this site and its my first and last moment on this website, and i hate breaking rules and especially seeing someone do that either so thats why this bot is. And if y'all saw a couple minutes ago another expose, it was what happens when you try to make a ragebaiter serious about something. I know rickenstein from vrchat and twitter drama, not this, but it seems like he's spreading disgraceness also on this website. But it is not about him. Yea anyways. I had gotten screenshots proving that a certain forsaken fan known as lefit0_ who's known in the fpe community, is a miner, with a o instead of e. Here are the screenshots proving it.

It was necesarry to cut the image in half to get through. Yeah, report this individual, my job here is done, i dont think i'll even check this website after that.
